paper_title: HAMMER: Hamiltonian Curiosity Augmented Large Language Model Reinforcement
base_algorithm: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) by Schulman et al. (2017)

training_process.reward_model: Uses reward r_{i,t} for each response at each timestep

algorithm_variants: Dynamic sAmpling Policy Optimization (DAPO) by Yu et al. (2025)
challenges: High variance and unstable convergence in early training
Early imbalance between easy and hard samples
title: HAMMER: Hamiltonian Curiosity Augmented Large Language Model Reinforcement
